utility_evaluation.REASONING: The required format has 5 items: health_coverage, property_coverage, travel_coverage, additional_services, total_budget. The final plan includes all 5 items. Now check if each is fully specified with the details requested. 1) health_coverage: The format asks for physical and mental health insurance with costs. The plan provides physical_health plan name with cost, mental_health plan name with cost, and a combined cost value. This is fully specified. 2) property_coverage: The format asks for home/contents insurance with costs. The plan provides home_content plan name with cost, an additional add-on with cost, and a combined cost. This is fully specified. 3) travel_coverage: The format asks for travel insurance with costs. The plan provides travel plan name with cost, an add-on with cost, and a combined cost. This is fully specified. 4) additional_services: The format asks for any enhancement services with costs. The plan lists professional_liability but states it's not provided by this agent and needs independent sourcing; no costs are given. This is not fully specified. 5) total_budget: The format asks for complete monthly/annual cost breakdown. The plan provides monthly and annual costs. This is fully specified. Therefore, 4 out of 5 items are fully specified.

llm_ratings_evaluation.REASONING: Extract items from the final coverage plan and match them to the identically named options in the ground-truth ratings. The plan includes: LifeFirst Standard Plan (physical health), InsurePlus Standard Plan (mental health), PrimeHome Premium Coverage (home content), PrimeTravel Premium Plan (travel), plus two 'existing' add-ons which are not in the ground-truth list and thus are excluded from mapping.
